case_title: MARY GUAN VS. CHING YEUNG LEE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUAN, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHING YEUNG AS AN INDIVUDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
